settings.heading: Elevate Your Routine With Clean, High-Performance Skincare
settings.subheading: Thoughtfully formulated essentials designed to nourish, restore, and reveal healthier-looking skin.
settings.badges: True Organic|True Natural|True Vegan|Cruelty-Free (Leaping Bunny & PETA Certified)|GMO-Free|Toxic-Free

settings.title: Niacinamide
settings.text: Helps refine the look of pores, support a balanced complexion, and improve visible skin clarity.

settings.title: Vitamin C
settings.text: Targets dullness with brightening support for more luminous, even-looking skin.

settings.title: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.text: Draws in moisture for lasting hydration and smoother, more supple-feeling skin.

settings.title: Botanical Extracts
settings.text: Plant-derived extracts including coffee extract help soothe and energize the feel of skin.

ingredients_ecophoria_gYBA7e.name: Ingredients - Ecophoria

settings.text: Vegan formulas designed for ingredient-conscious skincare routines.
Cruelty-free product development with clean, modern sensorial textures.
Botanical science paired with proven actives like niacinamide, vitamin C, and hyaluronic acid.
Ethical sourcing and sustainable packaging that supports lower-impact beauty.

settings.heading: Luxury clean skincare with values built in
settings.text: Ecophoria blends clean ingredients, botanical science, and ethical sourcing into a skincare ritual that feels luxurious and aligns with conscious beauty values.
settings.cta_text: Discover formulas that combine high-performance actives, vegan standards, and elevated daily care.
